mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( user_id, login_id, password, name, phone, birth, email, status, gender, e_name, postal_code, address, address_detail,created_at ) VALUES ( user_id_seq.NEXTVAL, #{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{birth}, #{email}, '정상',#{gender}, #{eName}, #{postalCode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, SYSDATE )
